What are you looking for? A company that actually cares about you and your future? Colleagues that care about each other and show it? A supportive work culture of learning and opportunity?

If so, you've come to the right place.

View Available Jobs
Careers Home

Our Culture
Why Livingston
About Us
Meet Livingston

Can an ambitious company maintain a genuinely supportive work environment while leading in its market? We are proof. At Livingston, one of North America’s top customs brokers, career advancement and continuous learning aren’t just possible but expected. Hybrid work isn't just allowed but embraced. If your goal is to build a career in a modern, people-first organization, we hope you’ll consider working with us.

This is what we stand for.

We are a team of teams committed to mutual support, respect, and making a difference for our customers.

Reassurance

We’ve built a culture where everyone can learn, grow, and advance, a place of opportunity.

Fairness

We are committed to integrity, fairness, and equal opportunity, free of discrimination.

Engagement

We are project-oriented. If you want to get involved, your interest will be taken seriously.

Support

Teamwork is how we work. Managers support teams. Colleagues support each other. We all pull together.

Responsibility

Livingston is socially responsibl
